mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance buckets reward inputs whose greenx fixed-point value creeps progressively past the 100000 (0x000186A0) threshold, giving a gradient that literal substitution lacks for this magnitude inequality.
one_line: VP gradient walks greenx past the 100000 magnitude threshold

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards inputs that partially match the multi-byte DTD structure, steering the chunk-scanner state machine into the ']' state that cmplog (no gradient) cannot incrementally walk toward.
one_line: VP gradient steers DTD scanner state machine to ']' closing state

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards incremental progress on structural literals that drive the DTD scanner to the neutral state, so a quote or ']' character arrives while state==0; cmplog's flat edge signal cannot retain partial-match progress toward this state.
one_line: VP gradient walks DTD scanner to neutral state before quote or ']' byte

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards partial progress on DTD content-model token/punctuation comparisons, enabling VPC to build a multi-child '(a|b|...)' element-content tree with a non-NULL c2 child that cmplog's edge-only feedback cannot assemble.
one_line: VP gradient assembles multi-child DTD content tree producing non-NULL c2 pointer

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient retains partial-match progress on the multi-clause comparison cascade leading into xmlIsDocNameChar, giving value_profile_cmplog a climbing signal toward the true branch that binary edge feedback alone cannot provide.
one_line: VP gradient rewards cascade partial-match progress toward docname true branch

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP Hamming/prefix-distance gradient rewards inputs matching more of the three-way 32-bit codepoint conjunction (0x0930, 0x094D, 0x0907), giving intermediate credit that cmplog's edge-only feedback cannot see, so VPC climbs the multi-equality gate.
one_line: VP gradient climbs three-way 32-bit codepoint conjunction toward Indic RA+virama+vowel

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards Hamming/prefix progress toward the exact 0x0A72 codepoint comparison, letting vpc climb to the match; cmplog carries the same I2S mutator but lacks the gradient, so it almost never satisfies the case label incrementally.
one_line: VP gradient climbs incrementally toward exact 0x0A72 codepoint case label

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient makes near-miss codepoint comparisons (one byte off from 0x0A72/0x0A3F) register as new coverage, steering corpus toward the exact matched vowel pair that cmplog's edge-only feedback cannot distinguish from any non-matching glyph.
one_line: VP gradient distinguishes near-miss codepoints, assembling exact Gurmukhi vowel pair

mechanism_summary: CMP_MAP gradient rewards Hamming/prefix progress on schema-name string comparisons and dotted-reference token assembly, letting vpc climb to a valid X.Y.Z structure that sets zDb non-null, which plain cmplog's edge feedback cannot incrementally approach.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP gradient assembles X.Y.Z dotted reference so zDb non-null at error block
